title: If governments keep restricting frontier AI, what happens next?
abstract: Explore the implications of escalating government restrictions on online freedoms and technological advancements through Ask HN: If Governments Keep Restricting...
abstract_zh: 你是不是已经厌倦了那些政府对着AI技术死命按刹车？如果他们继续限制，那可就精彩了！你准备好见证科技与监管之间的大逃亡了吗？来看看“问HN：假如政府继续限制前沿AI，接下来会发生什么”吧！
